jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at AIIMS - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
AIIMS, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Surgeon for our Rajkot operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About AIIMS:
AIIMS is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Wound Care

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AIIMS!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
